creator: croyle@gelemna.org
text:
These diffs update the www/amaya port to use the new version 3.2
distfile.  Bug fixes, new features and bugs added.

I don't think that the Australian mirror has ever worked, so I'm
dropping it from MASTER_SITES.

Fix: Apply this patch.  Note that patches/patch-ab can go away again.  It's
been incorporated into the main distribution.
